scripts.worktree:dev:1: cd .worktrees/*-1 2>/dev/null && pnpm dev || echo 'No worktree 1 found'
scripts.worktree:dev:2: cd .worktrees/*-2 2>/dev/null && pnpm dev || echo 'No worktree 2 found'
scripts.worktree:dev:3: cd .worktrees/*-3 2>/dev/null && pnpm dev || echo 'No worktree 3 found'
scripts.worktree:dev:4: cd .worktrees/*-4 2>/dev/null && pnpm dev || echo 'No worktree 4 found'
scripts.worktree:dev:5: cd .worktrees/*-5 2>/dev/null && pnpm dev || echo 'No worktree 5 found'
scripts.worktree:dev:6: cd .worktrees/*-6 2>/dev/null && pnpm dev || echo 'No worktree 6 found'
scripts.worktree:clean: git worktree list | grep -E '\.worktrees/' | awk '{print $1}' | xargs -I {} git worktree remove {} --force
